← Back to MIRAC Technologies

AI Concierge & Hotel Management Software — Maldives, Bali, UAE | MIRAC Technologies

Replace manual WhatsApp staff coordination with an intelligent AI concierge. Operations simplified.

Managing a luxury resort is complex. Guests expect instant responses, personalized service, and seamless experiences. However, traditional hotel management relies on outdated PMS software and disorganized WhatsApp groups. This leads to missed guest requests, inefficient housekeeping schedules, and lost revenue opportunities from upselling. MIRAC Technologies builds state-of-the-art AI concierge and hotel management software specifically for luxury resorts in the Maldives, Bali, UAE, and Thailand. Our solution completely replaces manual communication with an intelligent, multi-lingual AI concierge that connects guests directly to relevant hotel departments. Whether a guest wants to book a spa treatment, order room service, or request fresh towels, the AI handles the request instantly via WhatsApp or in-room tablets. The system integrates directly with housekeeping modules to dispatch tasks in real-time, improving operational efficiency. It also features a comprehensive guest CRM that stores preferences, allowing for targeted upselling of excursions, dining, and luxury amenities. Integration with major booking

platforms like Booking.com, Expedia, and Airbnb ensures a unified calendar and eliminates the risk of overbooking. By automating routine inquiries and streamlining operations, resorts can focus on delivering exceptional, memorable hospitality. With an initial investment starting at $15,000, our system guarantees a rapid return on investment by reducing staffing overhead and maximizing guest satisfaction. However, traditional hotel management relies on outdated PMS software and disorganized WhatsApp groups. This leads to missed guest requests, inefficient housekeeping schedules, and lost revenue opportunities from upselling. MIRAC Technologies builds state-of-the-art AI concierge and hotel management software specifically for luxury resorts in the Maldives, Bali, UAE, and Thailand. Our solution completely replaces manual communication with an intelligent, multi-lingual AI concierge that connects guests directly to relevant hotel departments. Whether a guest wants to book a spa treatment, order room service, or request fresh towels, the AI

handles the request instantly via WhatsApp or in-room tablets. The system integrates directly with housekeeping modules to dispatch tasks in real-time, improving operational efficiency. It also features a comprehensive guest CRM that stores preferences, allowing for targeted upselling of excursions, dining, and luxury amenities. Integration with major booking platforms like Booking.com, Expedia, and Airbnb ensures a unified calendar and eliminates the risk of overbooking. By automating routine inquiries and streamlining operations, resorts can focus on delivering exceptional, memorable hospitality. With an initial investment starting at $15,000, our system guarantees a rapid return on investment by reducing staffing overhead and maximizing guest satisfaction.
